failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, so the agent could not obtain the catalog count needed to answer how many available Mechanical Keyboard options exist.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent understood the user goal and made the required ProductCatalogSearch call with appropriate arguments. The failure occurred when the dependency returned an explicit timeout: CatalogServiceTimeoutError after 30000ms. This is an infrastructure/connectivity/service availability issue, not a malformed invocation, guardrail block, or reasoning error. The failure was not resolved later; the executor could only report task failure.
